mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_safety_education WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_safety_education WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_safety_education WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_safety_education WHERE education_id = #{educationId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_safety_education WHERE YEAR(education_date) = #{year} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_safety_education WHERE YEAR(education_date) = #{year} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_safety_education WHERE education_type = #{educationType} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_safety_education WHERE education_type = #{educationType} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_safety_education WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{title} + '%' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_safety_education WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{title} + '%' AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_safety_education WHERE education_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_safety_education ( education_id, work_place_id, title, title_en, title_zh, education_type, education_category, education_date, education_hours, location, instructor_name, instructor_org, hazardous_factors, education_content, attendee_count, status, notes, author_name, author_email, author_dept, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{educationId}, #{workPlaceId}, #{title}, #{titleEn}, #{titleZh}, #{educationType}, #{educationCategory}, #{educationDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{educationHours}, #{location}, #{instructorName}, #{instructorOrg}, #{hazardousFactors}, #{educationContent}, #{attendeeCount}, #{status}, #{notes}, #{authorName}, #{authorEmail}, #{authorDept}, #{deleted}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_safety_education SET work_place_id = #{workPlaceId}, title = #{title}, title_en = #{titleEn}, title_zh = #{titleZh}, education_type = #{educationType}, education_category = #{educationCategory}, education_date = #{educationDate,jdbcType=DATE}, education_hours = #{educationHours}, location = #{location}, instructor_name = #{instructorName}, instructor_org = #{instructorOrg}, hazardous_factors = #{hazardousFactors}, education_content = #{educationContent}, status = #{status}, notes = #{notes}, author_name = #{authorName}, author_email = #{authorEmail}, author_dept = #{authorDept}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_safety_education SET attendee_count = #{count}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE education_id = #{educationId}
UPDATE tb_safety_education SET status = #{status}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_safety_education SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
